description: Named operational launch shapes grouped by purpose and scale. Use smoke_* for the fastest checks, sanity_* for the smallest graph-producing sweeps, budget_* for the recommended decision-useful studies, standard_* for default single-configuration baselines, compare_* for targeted default-vs-variation checks, sweep_* for focused multi-run studies, and full_* for broad experiment launches. Legacy aliases are retained for compatibility.

smoke_default_quick.description: Fastest maintained end-to-end sanity check. Runs the default configuration on the simplest easy sample and one default-analysis task.

sanity_core_slice_r1.description: Smallest maintained sweep that still produces useful comparison graphs. Uses four focused, unique-task samples spanning config recovery, deceptive strings, packing triage, and low-string behavior recovery.
sanity_core_slice_r1.label: sanity-core

budget_best_value_r2.description: Recommended under-budget study for decision-useful comparisons. Uses seven focused, unique-task samples spanning config recovery, deceptive cues, packing triage, hash dispatch, and low-leakage behavior recovery while comparing tool surface, architecture, and worker breadth across two repetitions.
budget_best_value_r2.label: budget-best-value

budget_best_value_r1.description: Cheaper one-repetition version of the recommended budget study. Uses the same seven focused, unique-task samples and the same three high-value sweep families, but trades replicate strength for lower cost and faster turnaround.
budget_best_value_r1.label: budget-best-value-r1

coverage_broad_r1_60usd.description: One-repetition medium+hard broad-coverage experiment that uses the maintained broad sweep config but limits the preset to the worker/prompt study families needed to keep the current 0.50-per-sample-task heuristic under 60 USD.
coverage_broad_r1_60usd.label: coverage-broad-r1-60usd

standard_default_easy_suite.description: Default configuration across the easy corpus slice. Good day-to-day regression check before paying for broader sweeps.

standard_default_decoder.description: Default configuration as-is on the focused config-value recovery task. Useful baseline before running comparison presets.

compare_brief_decoder.description: Same narrow decoder task as the standard baseline, but with the brief query variant to test lower-detail prompting.

compare_detailed_decoder.description: Same narrow decoder task as the standard baseline, but with the detailed query variant to test higher-detail prompting.

compare_core_static_decoder.description: Narrow decoder baseline with the core_static tool profile, useful for observing the effect of a reduced tool surface.

compare_minimal_architecture_decoder.description: Narrow decoder baseline with the minimal worker architecture, useful for comparing broad specialist coverage against a smaller architecture.

compare_light_validator_decoder.description: Narrow decoder baseline with the light validator topology enabled, useful for measuring validator overhead and block behavior against the default no-validator flow.

compare_strict_validator_decoder.description: Narrow decoder baseline with validator gating and strict validator review. Useful for deliberately testing the harshest validation posture on one focused task.

compare_budget_model_decoder.description: Narrow decoder baseline with the budget model profile, forcing the cheaper model choice while keeping the task fixed.

compare_premium_model_decoder.description: Narrow decoder baseline with the premium model profile, forcing the stronger model choice while keeping the task fixed.

sweep_pilot_query_verbosity_r1.description: Cheapest focused paid sweep. Uses one medium-difficulty recovery task and only the query-verbosity sweep family.

sweep_validator_focus_r1.description: Focused validator study on one medium task. Useful when you want to compare validator topology and validator review strictness without paying for the full suite.

sweep_architecture_focus_r1.description: Focused worker-shape study on one medium task. Compares architecture preset, worker breadth, and worker prompt shape while holding the sample/task fixed.

sweep_easy_default_r1.description: Full maintained sweep, but only over the easy sample slice and with one repetition. Good medium-scale calibration run before the full suite.

full_suite_default_r1.description: Full maintained experimental sweep with one repetition. This is the best full-suite preset when you want broad coverage without replicate-heavy spend.

full_suite_default_r3.description: Full maintained experimental sweep with three repetitions. Use this for the heaviest default launch when you want replicate-aware comparisons.

paid_narrow_pilot_quiet.description: Compatibility alias for the narrow paid pilot, but with wrapper-level child output buffering enabled by default.
